name: aida
description: AI Development Agents (AIDA) - Agentic framework for autonomous project execution with human-in-the-loop checkpoints. Coordinates specialized sub-agents through a research-plan-execute-review pipeline.

skills.name: orchestrating-agents
skills.description: Core workflow for project planning and execution. Coordinates research, planning, execution, and review sub-agents.

skills.name: mapping-codebase
skills.description: Parallel codebase analysis skill. Spawns 4 parallel agents to produce 7 structured reference documents.

commands.name: progress
commands.description: Check project status and route to next action

commands.name: new-project
commands.description: Initialize a new project with PROJECT.md and planning structure

commands.name: map-codebase
commands.description: Analyze codebase with parallel agents, produce 7 reference documents

commands.name: create-roadmap
commands.description: Create a phased roadmap from PROJECT.md

commands.name: research
commands.description: Research a topic or phase before planning

commands.name: plan-phase
commands.description: Create a detailed execution plan for a specific phase

commands.name: verify
commands.description: Run full verification suite (type checking, tests, lint)

commands.name: pause-work
commands.description: Create a context handoff document for session breaks

commands.name: resume-work
commands.description: Restore context and resume from a previous session

commands.name: add-issue
commands.description: Log a deferred issue or enhancement to ISSUES.md

commands.name: review-issues
commands.description: Triage deferred issues and decide which to address

commands.name: metrics
commands.description: View and update project execution metrics

agents.name: researcher
agents.description: Explores codebase to gather context for phase planning

agents.name: planner
agents.description: Creates detailed phase execution plans from research findings

agents.name: executor
agents.description: Executes plan segments autonomously, handling coding, testing, and documentation

agents.name: reviewer
agents.description: Verifies phase completion quality, runs tests, validates outputs against plan

installation.postInstall: echo '✅ AIDA plugin installed! 2 skills, 13 commands, 4 agents ready. Restart Claude Code.'
